source_text: If a vehicle stalls, or ingests a cone, etc., it may be allowed to continue, subject to D.12.1.4 and D.12.4 ## D.12.10 Endurance Event - Black Flags D.12.10.1 A Black Flag will be shown at the designated location D.12.10.2
requirement_text_pred: A Black Flag will be shown at the designated location
